segments.text: Now we move from theory to practice. There is one step that trips most people up, and we will walk through a small case study that shows it clearly.
Here is the same idea in a different setting. Notice what stays the same and what has to change. That distinction is the whole point of this chapter.
Before you finish, check your work. The book lists the signs that an answer has gone wrong, and recommends a way to verify it.
